### Trac Ticket Missing "Has Patch" Flag

The referenced ticket **ticket-{ticket_id}** does not have the **Has patch** flag set in Trac. This flag must be checked before a pull request can be reviewed.

**What to do:**

1. Open the ticket at https://code.djangoproject.com/ticket/{ticket_id}.
2. Check the **Has patch** checkbox on the ticket.
3. Save the ticket, then reopen this PR.

For more information see https://docs.djangoproject.com/en/dev/internals/contributing/triaging-tickets/#has-patch.
